zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth-nic-John Grant of Freuchie, latterly of Kintail於1486年出生在蘇格蘭洛-爾金泰爾時，她的父親John  - Iain Am Bard Ruadh Grant 2nd Grant of Freuchie18歲，母親Margaret-nic-James Ogilvy of Deskford and Findlater17歲。她於1506年與John - Iain Mackenzie 9th of Kintail在蘇格蘭可洛馬迪夏爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1543年6月20日享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth-nic-John Grant of Freuchie, latterly of Kintail于1486年出生在苏格兰洛-爾金泰爾时，她的父亲John  - Iain Am Bard Ruadh Grant 2nd Grant of Freuchie18岁，母亲Margaret-nic-James Ogilvy of Deskford and Findlater17岁。她于1506年与John - Iain Mackenzie 9th of Kintail在苏格兰可洛馬迪夏爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1543年6月20日享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: Grant
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish, English, and especially Scottish (of Norman origin): nickname from Anglo-Norman French graund, graunt ‘tall, large’ (Old French grand, grant, from Latin grandis), given either to a person of remarkable size, or else in a relative way to distinguish two bearers of the same personal name, often representatives of different generations within the same family.
English: from the rare Middle English (and Old English) personal name Grante or Grente.
Irish: in Ireland this is usually the Norman Scottish name (see 1 above), but it was also adopted for Irish Mag Raighne, see Graney .

variants.name: Graney
meanings: Irish (Galway, Cork, and Kerry): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mag Raighne ‘son of Raighne’, a pet form of Raghnall. It has sometimes been changed to Grant . See also Rainey .
Possibly an altered form of Swiss German Gräni, unexplained.

variants.name: Grand
meanings: French: nickname from Old French grand, grant ‘tall, large’, from Latin grandis. See also Grant 1 and 4, compare Degrand and Legrand .
German: topographic name for someone who lived in a gravelly area, from Middle Low German grand ‘coarse gravel’.
German: nickname from a southern word of uncertain origin meaning ‘frustration, anger, ire’.

variants.name: Grande
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Salvatore, Rocco, Domenic, Mario, Antonio, Santo, Orlando, Americo, Carmine, Gennaro, Luigi, Pasquale, Saverio, Alberico.  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Alicia, Ricardo, Jorge, Juan, Raul, Angel, Atilio.
Italian, Spanish, and Portuguese: nickname for someone of large stature, in either a literal or figurative sense, from grande ‘tall, large’.
German: habitational name from Grande in Holstein or Grand in Bavaria.

variants.name: General
meanings: African American: from the English vocabulary word general, possibly adopted as a surname in honor of a certain general of the US army, most probably Ulysses S. Grant (see Grant , compare President ). Compare also 3 below.
German: nickname for a mercenary (employed in royal services).
Hispanic (mainly Philippines): nickname from Spanish general ‘general’ (military officer).

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth-nic-John Grant of Freuchie, latterly of Kintail was born in 1486, in Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland, her father, John  - Iain Am Bard Ruadh Grant 2nd Grant of Freuchie, was 18 and her mother, Margaret-nic-James Ogilvy of Deskford and Findlater, was 17. She married John - Iain Mackenzie 9th of Kintail in 1506, in Cromartyshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 20 June 1543, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth-nic-John Grant of Freuchie, latterly of Kintail est née en 1486, à Kintail, Ross-shire, Écosse, son père, John  - Iain Am Bard Ruadh Grant 2nd Grant of Freuchie, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Margaret-nic-James Ogilvy of Deskford and Findlater, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé John - Iain Mackenzie 9th of Kintail en 1506, à Cromartyshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 20 juin 1543, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth-nic-John Grant of Freuchie, latterly of Kintail 1486 in Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John  - Iain Am Bard Ruadh Grant 2nd Grant of Freuchie 18 und ihre Mutter Margaret-nic-James Ogilvy of Deskford and Findlater 17. Sie hat 1506 in Cromartyshire, Scotland John - Iain Mackenzie 9th of Kintail geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 20. Juni 1543 im Alter von 57 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth-nic-John Grant of Freuchie, latterly of Kintail è nata il nel 1486 nel Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland, sua padre, John  - Iain Am Bard Ruadh Grant 2nd Grant of Freuchie, aveva 18 anni e sua madre, Margaret-nic-James Ogilvy of Deskford and Findlater, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato John - Iain Mackenzie 9th of Kintail nel 1506, nel Cromartyshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 20 giugno 1543, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth-nic-John Grant of Freuchie, latterly of Kintailが1486年にスコットランドロス-シュアイアキンティイルで生まれた時，父John  - Iain Am Bard Ruadh Grant 2nd Grant of Freuchieは18歳，母Margaret-nic-James Ogilvy of Deskford and Findlaterは17歳であった。1506年にスコットランドクロマルトイシュアイアでJohn - Iain Mackenzie 9th of Kintailと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1543年6月20日に57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth-nic-John Grant of Freuchie, latterly of Kintail(이)가 1486년 스컷랜드 로스-실르 킨테일에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John  - Iain Am Bard Ruadh Grant 2nd Grant of Freuchie(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret-nic-James Ogilvy of Deskford and Findlater(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 1506년 스컷랜드 크로마티실르에서 John - Iain Mackenzie 9th of Kintail(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1543년 6월 20일 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth-nic-John Grant of Freuchie, latterly of Kintail nasceu em 1486, em Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland, seu pai, John  - Iain Am Bard Ruadh Grant 2nd Grant of Freuchie, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Margaret-nic-James Ogilvy of Deskford and Findlater, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com John - Iain Mackenzie 9th of Kintail em 1506, em Cromartyshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 20 de junho de 1543, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth-nic-John Grant of Freuchie, latterly of Kintail родилась в 1486 г. в местности кинтеил, росс-шир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени John  - Iain Am Bard Ruadh Grant 2nd Grant of Freuchie было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret-nic-James Ogilvy of Deskford and Findlater, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John - Iain Mackenzie 9th of Kintail в 1506 г. в местности кромертишир, Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 20 июня 1543 г. в возрасте 57 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth-nic-John Grant of Freuchie, latterly of Kintail nació en 1486, en Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland, su papá, John  - Iain Am Bard Ruadh Grant 2nd Grant of Freuchie, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Margaret-nic-James Ogilvy of Deskford and Findlater, tenía 17 años. Se casó con John - Iain Mackenzie 9th of Kintail en 1506, en Cromartyshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 20 de junio de 1543, a la edad de 57 años.
